## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] Convex per-user authorization is preserved (no query/mutation/action leaks data across users)
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or keys committed (placeholders only; `.env.local` stays gitignored)
- [ ] Screenshots / screen recording attached for any UI change
